name: boundary-contracts
description: Make architecture and change-scope boundaries executable for AI-assisted codebases.

scripts.scenario:out-of-scope: BOUNDARY_CONTRACTS_DETERMINISTIC=1 tsx src/cli.ts diff examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-out-of-scope-change --scope auth-login-fix --changed-files examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-out-of-scope-change/changed-files.txt --out examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-out-of-scope-change/reports/boundary-report.md --json-out examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-out-of-scope-change/reports/boundary-report.json || test $? -eq 1
scripts.scenario:protected-path: BOUNDARY_CONTRACTS_DETERMINISTIC=1 tsx src/cli.ts diff examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-protected-path-change --scope auth-login-fix --changed-files examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-protected-path-change/changed-files.txt --out examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-protected-path-change/reports/boundary-report.md --json-out examples/nextjs-auth/scenarios/drift-protected-path-change/reports/boundary-report.json || test $? -eq 1
scripts.scenario:all: npm run scenario:healthy && npm run scenario:cross-boundary && npm run scenario:out-of-scope && npm run scenario:protected-path
